scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../electron && npm install
scripts.build:go: cd backend && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build -o ../electron/bin/guard_amd64 ./cmd/guard && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build -o ../electron/bin/guard_arm64 ./cmd/guard && lipo -create -output ../electron/bin/guard ../electron/bin/guard_amd64 ../electron/bin/guard_arm64 && rm ../electron/bin/guard_amd64 ../electron/bin/guard_arm64
scripts.build:all: npm run build:go && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron
